text: Moving between these two spaces, I sense the dualities of order and imagination: beyond the glass, the structured emptiness of a meeting room waits in crisp silence, a suggestion of preparation and expectation; in contrast, the vibrant wall and information displays invite curiosity and thought, their colors and words stirring my mind. I feel curious and contemplative, aware of the quiet potential in both spaces, yet drawn more strongly to the vivid promise of new ideas and the unknown.
